name: Calendly
description: Calendly is a scheduling automation platform. Its REST API lets you manage event types, scheduled events, invitees, availability, organization memberships, and webhook subscriptions. All resources are identified by URIs.

capabilities.name: users_get_current
capabilities.description: Retrieve the authenticated user's profile including name, email, timezone, and scheduling URL.

capabilities.name: users_get
capabilities.description: Retrieve a specific user's profile by their URI.

capabilities.name: event_types_list
capabilities.description: List all event types for a user or organization, including active, inactive, and draft types.

capabilities.name: event_types_get
capabilities.description: Retrieve a specific event type by its UUID.

capabilities.name: scheduled_events_list
capabilities.description: List scheduled events for a user or organization with optional filtering by status and date range.

capabilities.name: scheduled_events_get
capabilities.description: Retrieve details of a specific scheduled event by UUID.

capabilities.name: scheduled_events_cancel
capabilities.description: Cancel a scheduled event, optionally providing a cancellation reason.

capabilities.name: invitees_list
capabilities.description: List all invitees for a scheduled event with optional status filtering.

capabilities.name: invitees_get
capabilities.description: Get details about a specific invitee of a scheduled event.

capabilities.name: event_type_available_times_list
capabilities.description: Retrieve available time slots for an event type within a date range.

capabilities.name: organization_memberships_list
capabilities.description: List all memberships in an organization.

capabilities.name: organization_memberships_get
capabilities.description: Retrieve a specific organization membership.

capabilities.name: organization_memberships_delete
capabilities.description: Remove a user from the organization.

capabilities.name: organization_invitations_list
capabilities.description: List pending organization invitations.

capabilities.name: organization_invitations_create
capabilities.description: Invite a user to join the organization.

capabilities.name: organization_invitations_get
capabilities.description: Retrieve a specific organization invitation.

capabilities.name: organization_invitations_delete
capabilities.description: Revoke a pending organization invitation.

capabilities.name: webhook_subscriptions_list
capabilities.description: List all webhook subscriptions for a user or organization.

capabilities.name: webhook_subscriptions_create
capabilities.description: Create a webhook subscription to receive real-time notifications when events are scheduled or canceled.

capabilities.name: webhook_subscriptions_get
capabilities.description: Retrieve a specific webhook subscription.

capabilities.name: webhook_subscriptions_delete
capabilities.description: Delete a webhook subscription.

capabilities.name: routing_forms_list
capabilities.description: List all routing forms for an organization.

capabilities.name: routing_forms_get
capabilities.description: Retrieve a specific routing form by UUID.

capabilities.name: routing_form_submissions_list
capabilities.description: List all submissions for a routing form.

capabilities.name: routing_form_submissions_get
capabilities.description: Retrieve a specific routing form submission.

capabilities.name: data_compliance_delete_invitee
capabilities.description: Delete invitee data for GDPR/data compliance purposes.
